! ChIMES Multilayer CO Short Range Parameters for Publication (DOI: TBD)
!
! These parameters correspond to a ChIMES multilayer CO model for 2400K to 9000K with densities ranging from 1.8 - 4.0 g/ml.
! The model was developed to compare the performance of single layer and multilayer ChIMES models against DFT.
! It is not a fully optimized representation for general CO simulations and is intended primarily for benchmarking purposes.

! Date  2026-04-06
!
! Number of equations            =  508200
! DLARS code for LASSO used
! DLARS alpha = 1.0000e-04
! Reading output from prior DLARS calculation
! RMS force error                =  4.7510e+02
! max abs variable               =  1.9648e+03
! number of fitting vars         =  685
! Bayesian Information Criterion =  6.2736e+06
!
